sourcesContent:
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { FaSearch, FaBook, FaFileAlt, FaGraduationCap, FaDownload, FaArrowRight } from 'react-icons/fa'; import './Home.css'; const Home = () => { const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(''); const [stats, setStats] = useState([ { title: 'Total Notes', value: '5000+', icon: , color: '#4f46e5' }, { title: 'PYQs', value: '2000+', icon: , color: '#ec4899' }, { title: 'Courses', value: '5+', icon: , color: '#f59e0b' }, { title: 'Downloads', value: '15000+', icon: , color: '#10b981' }, ]); const [popularCourses, setPopularCourses] = useState([ { id: 1, name: 'B.Tech', icon: '💻', students: '2500+', color: '#4f46e5' }, { id: 2, name: 'BCA', icon: '📱', students: '1800+', color: '#ec4899' }, { id: 3, name: 'BBA', icon: '📊', students: '1500+', color: '#f59e0b' }, { id: 4, name: 'MBA', icon: '💼', students: '1200+', color: '#10b981' }, { id: 5, name: 'MCA', icon: '💻', students: '900+', color: '#8b5cf6' }, { id: 6, name: 'B.Com', icon: '💰', students: '1100+', color: '#ef4444' }, ]); const [recentMaterials, setRecentMaterials] = useState([ { id: 1, title: 'Data Structures Notes', type: 'Notes', course: 'B.Tech', downloads: 234 }, { id: 2, title: 'Python Programming PYQ', type: 'PYQ', course: 'BCA', downloads: 189 }, { id: 3, title: 'DBMS Syllabus', type: 'Syllabus', course: 'MCA', downloads: 156 }, { id: 4, title: 'Operating Systems Notes', type: 'Notes', course: 'B.Tech', downloads: 145 }, ]); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleSearch = (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if (searchQuery.trim()) { navigate(`/search?q=${encodeURIComponent(searchQuery)}`); } }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Welcome to Study Portal

Your complete learning ecosystem. Access notes, previous year papers, syllabus, and more — all in one place, absolutely free.

setSearchQuery(e.target.value)} className="search-input" />
10K+ Happy Students
50+ Subjects
24/7 Access
{/* Stats Section */}
{stats.map((stat, index) => (
{stat.icon}

{stat.value}

{stat.title}

))}
{/* Popular Courses Section */}

Popular Courses

Most enrolled courses by students

{popularCourses.map((course) => (
navigate(`/course/${course.id}`)} >
{course.icon}

{course.name}

{course.students} students

))}
{/* Recent Materials Section */}

Recent Materials

Latest uploaded study materials

{recentMaterials.map((material) => (
{material.type}

{material.title}

{material.course}

{material.downloads} downloads
))}
{/* CTA Section */}

Ready to Start Learning?

Join thousands of students who are already using Study Portal

); }; export default Home;
